case_title: ORO SPANISH BROADCASTIN INC RADIO VS BLACK DAN INDDBA CONSUMER CREDIT CARD SERV AKA CIA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,348.99 FILED BY ORO SPANISH BROADCASTIN INC             RADIO STATION KIQI AS TO DEFENDANT BLACK DAN INDDBA CONSUMER CREDIT CARD SERV AKA CIA HINSHAW MICHAEL INDDBA CONSUMER CREDIT CARD SERV ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HINSHAW MICHAEL INDDBA CONSUMER CREDIT CARD SERV
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BLACK DAN INDDBA CONSUMER CREDIT CARD SERV AKA CIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ORO SPANISH BROADCASTIN INC             RADIO STATION KIQI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLACK DAN INDDBA CONSUMER CREDIT CARD SERV AKA CIA HINSHAW MICHAEL INDDBA CONSUMER CREDIT CARD SERV $1,960.00 PRINCIPAL, $154.53 INTEREST, $76.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,190.53 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO DEFENDANT RETURNED. RETURN SERVICE DISCONTINUED.
